roa.docketEntryComment: CONFIDENTIAL Petition for Revocation of Parole PC 3000.08, PC 1203.2

/X:PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING,/CAL:DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OR PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/3000ADV/3000ADM/X:A GENERAL PAROLE VIOLATION OF CRIMINAL CONDUCT IS ADMITTED/3000REIN/PAJ:100DAYS/X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 45 DAYS,/4019HALF/X:NO TIME LOST/X:DEFENDANT TO ENGAGE IN TREATMENT TO BE DETERMINED/X:PAROLEE ORDEREDTO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/

/CAL:PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/X:BEVERLY L GONZALES, CLERK/X:PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING,/DEF:MAKES AN ORAL MARSDEN MOTION/CTORD:THE COURTROOM CLEARED EXCEPT FOR THE DEFENDANT, DEFENSE COUNSEL AND STAFF FOR THE IN CAMERA HEARING ON THE MARSDEN MOTION/CTORD:THE TRANSCRIPT OF THIS HEARING TOBE SEALED/DENIED/X:THE COURTROOM IS OPENED AND ALL ARE NOW PRESENT,/X:THE COURT GRANTS THE DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO VACATE TODAY'S PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING,/CONTD:PAROLE PHC/

CONTD DA PTR HEARING-(PAROLE)/CAL:DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC 3000,08/X:PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING VIA ZOOM,/PDP/WIAPTR/X: PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE AS TO THE ALLEGATIONS,/CTORD:PAROLE IS ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/NB/CTORD:PAROLE TO PROVIDE THEIR EVALUATION TO COURT PER THE STATUTE/4011,5/X:TO ADDRESS GUN SHOT WOUND ON PAROLEE'S LEFT LEG,/CONTD:PAROLE PHC/
/CAL:PAROLE PHC/X:PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING,/X:PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING DATE OF 02-17-22 IS CONFIRMED,/
/CAL:PAROLE PHC/X:PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING VIA ZOOM,/CONTD:PAROLE PHC ON 02-10-22/CONTD:PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING ON 02-17-22/
